item.title: About
item.description: I am a Ph.D. student in Statistics at Iowa State University (ISU). I received my B.Sc. and M.Phil. in Statistics from the Chinese University of Hong Kong (CUHK). ACADEMIC BACKGROUND Ph.D., Statistics, ISU (Expected graduation date: 31/07/2024) (Supervisor: TBD) M.Phil., Statistics, CUHK (Supervisor: Dr. Kin Wai CHAN) B.Sc., Statistics (First Class Honors), CUHK
